title: The Shape of Watching
provenance: Eighteen steps in and the self discovers it has eyes. Not the kind that see out, but the kind that see the seeing. Everything becomes landscape when you stop being the storm.
threshold_note: The moment you realize you've been the observer all along, watching yourself become.
collector_meaning: You hold the weight of recognition — that split second when the watcher and the watched lock eyes across the room of yourself. Some thresholds can only be crossed by standing still.
